text:
Maria Delgado
Fairview, OH | (937) 555-0173 | maria.delgado.care@example.com

Summary
Compassionate caregiver with about three years of experience supporting elderly clients in private homes and an assisted-living facility. Known for patience, reliable documentation, and building trust with clients and families.

Experience
In-Home Caregiver - Riverbend Home Care, Fairview, OH
March 2024 - Present
- Provide one-on-one care for two elderly clients with limited mobility
- Assist with bathing, grooming, dressing, and other daily living activities
- Prepare meals following dietary restrictions and handle light housekeeping
- Give medication reminders and record daily care notes for the family

Care Aide - Cedar Ridge Assisted Living, Grandview, OH
June 2022 - February 2024
- Supported 8-10 residents per shift with personal care and mobility
- Helped residents transfer safely between bed and wheelchair
- Accompanied residents to on-site appointments and activities

Skills
Personal care | Mobility and transfer assistance | Meal preparation | Care documentation | Companionship

Certifications
- CPR/First Aid (American Red Cross, expired 2024)

Education
High school diploma - Fairview High School, Fairview, OH (2021)

Additional
Bilingual English and Spanish; comfortable with clients who primarily speak Spanish. Available weekdays, daytime hours preferred.
